data.name: Drowzy
data.description:
This condition brings a creature to the brink of falling asleep. Creatures immune to effects that would put them to sleep are immune to this condition. While a creature is drowsy, it isunder the following effects:
* It moves at half speed.
* It has disadvantage on attack rolls, ability checks, andDexterity saves.
* It can't concentrate.
* Attacks against it have advantage.
* The only spells it can cast are cantrips.
